interpretation: CRD vocabulary covers 75.5% of 159 unique kinds across 35 workloads (13 production + 22 scenarios). Production workloads alone activate 69.8%. Logarithmic saturation (R²=0.844) indicates compositional completeness: early workloads discover most kinds, later workloads reuse existing vocabulary. Specification sparsity ratio: 16:1.
caveats: N=1 builder: all workloads designed by same person
No formal proof of completeness; empirical coverage only
